changes: Corrected the Ledger technical design after black-box execution exposed a missing public scope seam. Added one provider-neutral idempotent ledger.reconciliation.scope.register mutation for an approved complete account-period manifest and its entire statement-row evidence set; defined atomic validation, account-period logical uniqueness, replay/conflict behavior, closed errors, operation-registry expansion, and a dedicated contract test. Link suggestions are clear, decision paths and coverage are healthy. The existing assumed Hermes client validation remains a known external-dependency warning; no new external API claim was introduced. Installed Lex 0.5.7 does not expose the design skill's naming normalize or review lint subcommands even though both invocations exit zero after printing top-level help.
